case_title: PHAN, LARRY DBA KIRIN CUTTING SERVICE VS CALLAHAN, BRIAN IND/DBA C ET C

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PHAN, LARRY DBA KIRIN CUTTING SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, BRIAN IND/DBA C ET C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-23-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, BRIAN IND/DBA C ET C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PHAN, LARRY DBA KIRIN CUTTING SERVICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, BRIAN IND/DBA C ET C $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,027.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, BRIAN IND/DBA C ET C
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,833.32 AS TO DEFENDANT CALLAHAN, BRIAN IND/DBA C ET C
CERTIFIED MAILING TO DEFT. RETURNED TO COURT UNCLAIMED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CALLAHAN, BRIAN IND/DBA C ET C IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PHAN, LARRY DBA KIRIN CUTTING SERVICE PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

TRIAL RESET TO JUN-25-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
